response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Audio matched the reference lyrics perfectly for 'とくべつ、して' and the MC segment was transcribed manually. 2. JSON Usage: Fully used for the song segment; transcription was corrected where the Reference JSON differed slightly (e.g., 'ゴミめいた' instead of 'ゴミみたいな', and 'とくべちゅ' instead of 'とくべつ'). 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles were synchronized precisely to Miko's vocalizations. Subtitle blocks for the MC segment were split to reflect natural speech pauses.

subtitles.original: はーい、みんなー、はろー！
subtitles.english: Hi, everyone, hello!

subtitles.original: エリートみこアイドルのさくらみこー！
subtitles.english: It's elite shrine maiden idol Sakura Miko!

subtitles.original: さくらみこ生誕祭2026「Fashion Beat」に来てくれてどうもありがとうございます！イェーイ！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much for coming to Sakura Miko Birthday Live 2026 'Fashion Beat'! Yay!

subtitles.original: 今年でなんとみこちゃん、18.8歳になりました！
subtitles.english: And this year, Miko-chan has actually turned 18.8 years old!

subtitles.original: たぶん18.8歳だよね？
subtitles.english: It's probably 18.8, right?

subtitles.original: はい、あの0.1でね、刻んでいく系のVTuberですから。
subtitles.english: Yes, because I'm the type of VTuber who ages in increments of 0.1.

subtitles.original: 今年でもう18.8歳になっております！わー！
subtitles.english: So I've reached 18.8 years old this year! Wow!

subtitles.original: えー、そしてそして、今回のライブのテーマは、Fashion Beatにちなんでいるんですね。ファッションとなっております。
subtitles.english: And, and, the theme of this live show is based on 'Fashion Beat'. It's all about 'Fashion'.

subtitles.original: 色んなね、演出が盛りだくさんなので、ぜひ楽しんでください！
subtitles.english: There are lots of different special performances, so please enjoy!

subtitles.original: じゃあね、ちょっと、もうファッションちゅうので、みこちゃんも、ちょっとだけチェンジしちゃおうかなー。
subtitles.english: Well then, since it's about fashion, maybe Miko-chan should change a little bit too.

subtitles.original: はい、上向いててください。よいしょ。
subtitles.english: Okay, look up, please. Up we go.

subtitles.original: はい、じゃーん！
subtitles.english: And, ta-da!

subtitles.original: ということで、えー、クリスマスのね、ライブではね、あの、あまりひ...
subtitles.english: So, for the Christmas live, I couldn't really...
